name: UpdateNuspec
description: CLI to sync NuGet dependencies in *.nuspec with PackageReference from matching *.csproj files; optionally update package.json.
helpMarkDown: Recursively scans `dir` for `.nuspec` files and rewrites `<dependencies>` from the sibling `{id}.csproj`. Optionally updates `package.json` `version` and, when `dependencyScope` is set, scoped npm dependencies. [Documentation](https://github.com/denis-peshkov/update-nuspec-action)
author: Denis Peshkov

inputs.name: dir
inputs.label: Scan directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Root folder to scan recursively. Defaults to `$(Build.SourcesDirectory)` when empty.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.label: Dry run
inputs.helpMarkDown: Print the report without modifying files.

inputs.name: packageVersion
inputs.label: package.json version
inputs.helpMarkDown: SemVer for `package.json` `version` (e.g. `$(GitVersion_SemVer)` after gitversion/execute). Env fallback: `GitVersion_SemVer`.

inputs.name: dependencyScope
inputs.label: npm dependency scope prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: npm package name prefix. Matching dependencies are set to `^packageVersion`. Skipped when empty.
